Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-05-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Andrew J. Wiegel, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Thomas F. Murphy, as Trustee of the Murphy Trust UDT dated October 3, 2003.
Mr. Murphy was placed under oath and examined.
Michael Ware, a witness for plaintiff, was placed under oath but did not testify.
No appearance by defendants John Wo, an individual, Steven Wo, an individual or SWO Inc., a California Corporation.
Defaults were entered against the defendants on February 17, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on February 25, 2009.

Plaintiff introduced the following Exhibit:

Exhibit 1---SF Rents Basic Lease Information dated October 23, 2009------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Thomas F. Murphy as Trustee of the Murphy Trust UDT dated October 3, 2003, and against the Defaulted Defendants John Wo, an individual, Steven Wo, an individual and SWO Inc., a California Corporation as follows:

Damages/Principal - $352,515.07.
Attorney's Fees - To Be Determined..
Costs - To Be Determined.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than May 8, 2009.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-17-2009 Continued To Jun-19-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
